description_long: This house features a single-story layout with a flat roof and a modern, industrial-inspired design. The exterior walls are clad in reddish-brown brick, contrasted by large, black-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The floor plan includes multiple rooms, visible through the open ceiling, with distinct living, kitchen, and utility areas. The main entryway is marked by a double door with an arched transom window, flanked by large windows on either side. The interior is predominantly white, with minimalistic furnishings and fixtures, emphasizing a clean and open aesthetic. The house is designed for urban environments, with a focus on functional living spaces and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A single-story, flat-roofed house with reddish-brown brick walls, large black-framed windows, and a modern, open interior layout. The main entry features a double door with an arched transom window.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the house with multiple large windows and a clear view into the open-plan living and kitchen areas.
description_view_1: The front of the house is visible, showcasing the main double-door entryway with an arched transom window and adjacent large windows.
description_view_2: This side view displays a long stretch of brick wall with several windows and a glimpse into the central living space.
description_view_3: The rear and side of the house are shown, with additional windows and a clear view of the flat roof and open interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double door with arched transom window, no porch or steps, flanked by large windows
